title: User humidifier comfort preferences and device status
summary: The user prefers 50% or higher ambient humidity for comfort, permits automatic re-activation attempts when humidity remains below the 50% comfort threshold, and the user's Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 continues to have persistent connection or functional issues that prevent successful automatic activation, requiring manual operation when automatic activation attempts fail.
details: User prefers ≥50% ambient humidity for comfort
Allows automatic re-activation attempts below 50% humidity threshold
Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 has persistent connection/functional issues
Automatic activation consistently fails, requires manual operation
